reason: Verified agent can use GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, displaying Super Agent application with sidebar showing multiple agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260331-011725-nh4q" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened successfully
Verified agent status is "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" (acceptable per requirement)

Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message successfully sent, session "GitHub Username Verification Request" created, agent status changed to "working"
Agent's first tool call "Get GitHub username" failed, agent checked for connected accounts — Bash tool executed, found no GitHub CLI in environment
Card appeared requesting GitHub account access — "Request Connected Account" card appeared asking to grant GitHub access
Selected GitHub account checkbox and clicked "Grant Access" — GitHub account selected and access granted, agent resumed processing
API Request Review card appeared for GitHub GET /user endpoint — Card showed API call details with required scopes (user, read:user)
Clicked "Allow" button to permit the API request — API request approved, agent resumed processing
Agent provided response with GitHub username — Agent completed successfully with response: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." Agent status returned to "idle" after 36 seconds of processing
Took screenshot of final result — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation and GitHub username verification result
